chat.title: Agent Chat
chat.emptyTitle: Start a conversation with MiniMax Agent

coding.title: Agent Coding Workspace
coding.selectFile: Select a file from the explorer
coding.selectFileHint: Or use Ctrl+K to open Command Palette

workspace.pickFolder: Pick the project folder the agent will read/write

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize appearance, models, and API access.
settings.audioDefaultsDesc: These defaults are sent with every Music panel request. The Music panel reads them on mount and the backend uses them as the fallback if a request omits them.
settings.audioLowBitrateWarn: Low bitrate selected ({kbps} kbps). Audio may sound noticeably compressed — consider 128 kbps or higher for music.
settings.audioHighBitrateHint: Selected preset: {khz} kHz · {kbps} kbps · {format}. Higher bitrates produce larger files but preserve more detail.
settings.autoCompactDesc: Automatically summarize earlier turns when the conversation reaches 80% of the model's context window. The 90% safety net always runs (ignores this toggle) to prevent the context from blowing the limit.
settings.audioFormatDesc: Output file format for music and speech generation
settings.audioSampleRateDesc: Sample rate of the output audio
settings.generationDefaultsHint: Used by Music and Speech panels on mount; sent with every request that omits them.
settings.aboutYouDesc: Tell the agent about yourself — your preferences, background, goals, or anything you want it to remember across all conversations.
settings.aboutYouPlaceholder: e.g. I'm a full-stack developer based in Brazil. I prefer clean, modern UI designs and work mainly with React and Python. I speak Portuguese and English.
settings.aboutYouHint: This bio is injected into every conversation automatically.
settings.themeDesc: 9 curated palettes — applied instantly across the app
settings.maxStepsHint: Maximum number of reasoning steps per request
settings.appWorkspaceHint: Where MiniMax Studio stores conversations, task board, media generations, and settings. Coding sessions pick their own project folder from the header — this one is fixed.
settings.apiBaseHint: Leave empty to use the default MiniMax endpoint for the selected region. Set a custom URL only if you are routing through an Anthropic-compatible proxy.
settings.systemPromptHint: The system prompt is loaded from {file} in your config directory (the same folder as {yaml}). Edit that file directly to customize the base prompt. The full agent prompt is generated at session start by combining that file with your profile, configured MCP tools, and the current workspace.
settings.apiKeyNotConfigured: Not configured — agent calls will fail
settings.apiEndpointDesc: Route requests to the nearest region
settings.webSearchDesc: Search the web for real-time information. The agent uses this tool when it needs current facts, recent news, or anything beyond its training cutoff.
settings.mcpEmpty: No custom MCP servers configured yet.
settings.name: Name

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Your all-in-one platform for MiniMax Token Plan. Chat, generate media, code, and manage tasks — all in one place.
onboarding.chatDesc: Chat with the MiniMax-M3 powered agent. Ask questions, get help with coding, or brainstorm ideas.
onboarding.mediaDesc: Generate text-to-speech, images, music, and videos using MiniMax APIs.
onboarding.codeDesc: Explore files, edit code, use the integrated terminal, and manage Git.
onboarding.tasksDesc: Organize your work with a Kanban board. Create tasks, track progress, and manage priorities.
onboarding.tipsDesc: Press Ctrl+K for Command Palette. Use Ctrl+Enter to send messages. Tasks are saved automatically.

session.activeDesc: The agent is currently processing your request. Switching tabs may interrupt the session.

image.title: Image Generation
image.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
image.promptTransformPlaceholder: Describe how to transform the reference image...
image.pleaseUpload: Please upload a reference image or provide a URL

music.title: Music Generation
music.originalTip: Generate original music with lyrics and vocals
music.instrumentalActiveHint: This song will be instrumental, with no vocals or lyrics.
music.coverTip: Create a cover version of an existing song
music.coverReferenceAudioHint: Upload or paste a URL — mp3, wav, flac, m4a (6s–6 min, max 50 MB).
music.coverUploadCta: Click to upload or drag & drop
music.coverPreprocessSuccess: Lyrics extracted — review and edit before generating.
music.coverPromptHint: 10–300 characters describing the target cover style.
music.coverLyricsHintQuick: Optional. Leave empty to auto-extract lyrics from the reference audio via ASR.
music.coverLyricsHintCustom: 10–1000 characters. Required when using a preprocessed feature.
music.coverLyricsRequired: Click "Extract Lyrics" first, or paste your own (10–1000 chars).
music.coverFeatureExpired: This feature ID has expired — please re-extract lyrics.
music.coverPreprocessFailed: Preprocess failed. Verify the audio file and try again.
music.coverUploadFailed: Upload failed. Try a smaller file or check the format.
music.coverUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http(s) URL or upload a file.
music.speechCloneSampleHint: mp3, m4a or wav — 10 s to 5 min, max 20 MB.
music.speechCloneSamplePlaceholder: Drop a clip or click to upload
music.speechCloneVoiceIdHint: 8–256 chars, must start with a letter, [A-Za-z0-9_-], no trailing -/_.
music.speechClonePromptHint: Improves similarity — needs a sub-8 s clip + transcript.
music.speechCloneSevenDayNote: Cloned voices are deleted if unused for 7 days.
music.speechDesignPromptPlaceholder: A warm, middle-aged male narrator with a calm British accent.
music.speechConfirmDeleteVoice: Delete this voice? This cannot be undone.
music.speechUploadFailed: Sample upload failed. Check format and size.
music.speechTaskPending: Generating — poll again in a moment…
music.lyricsThemePlaceholder: A soulful blues song about a rainy night
music.lyricsExistingPlaceholder: Paste the lyrics you want to refine…
music.lyricsEditNeedsSource: Existing lyrics are required in edit mode.
music.modelHint: Music 2.6 is the paid Tier-Plan model; Free has lower RPM but is available to all API-key users.
music.stylePlaceholder: e.g. Upbeat jazz song about a summer beach, cinematic orchestral...
music.vocalPlaceholder: e.g. warm male baritone, bright female soprano, duet with harmonies
music.lyricsRequired: Lyrics are required (or enable Auto-generate lyrics).
music.instrumentalNeedsPrompt: Instrumental mode requires a style prompt.
music.banner: MiniMax Music-2.6 — Text-to-music with lyrics and instrumental generation (cover & lyrics generator coming in Phase 2/3)

contextWindow.warnText: Context at {pct}%. Compact now to free room for the next turn.
contextWindow.autoText: Context at {pct}%. Auto-compacting to keep the conversation going.
contextWindow.maxText: Context at {pct}%. Forcing compact — turn input will resume once it drops below 90%.

agentContext.title: Agent context
agentContext.subtitle: 5 files define how the agent behaves in this workspace.
agentContext.gracefulDegradation: Any combination of empty files works — the agent degrades gracefully and the banner warns when something essential is missing.

banner.missingFile: {file} missing — the agent has limited knowledge about you.

wizard.title: Let's set up your MiniMax Studio
wizard.subtitle: 4 quick steps. You can skip and configure later.
wizard.name: What should I call you?
wizard.identityQ: What's my default role in this workspace?
wizard.reviewQ: Confirm the files that will be created

memory.title: Agent memory
memory.empty: Empty. The agent will populate as you work.

daily.title: Logs for {date}
daily.appendOnly: Append-only · generated by the agent each turn
